scripts.dev:
echo 'Run in separate terminals:
  npm run pb:dev
  npm run web:dev
Mailpit UI: http://localhost:8025'
scripts.pb:kill: pkill -f 'docker compose watch' || true; docker compose down
scripts.pb:test:reset: npm run pb:test:down && npm run pb:test:up
scripts.e2e: npm run pb:test:up && set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && npx playwright test
scripts.e2e:a11y: npm run pb:test:up && set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && (cd web && npx playwright test --config playwright.a11y.config.ts)
scripts.test:hooks: npm run pb:test:up && set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && npm run --prefix web test:hooks
scripts.test:schema: npm run pb:test:up && set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && npm run --prefix web test:schema
